ModMetaData.name: Hospitality: Room Service
ModMetaData.author: ledronas
ModMetaData.description:
Adds guest services on top of Hospitality.
MEDICAL TREATMENT Guest beds can be flagged medical again (Hospitality normally disables this). Colonist doctors will tend injured visitors, who pay for treatment in silver - or get treated for free if they can't afford it, so nobody dies over a bill. Beds can also charge a per-day fee for the time a guest spends occupying one.
Rarely, an arriving guest may need a specific operation instead (a missing body part with a bionic or prosthetic replacement) - if the colony has (or can produce) the part, a letter offers the option to treat them for a labor fee plus reimbursement for the part, and you can decline if you'd rather not.
COMPANIONSHIP Colonists with the new "Companionship" work type enabled (off by default - opt in per pawn on the Work tab, and locked to adults - nobody under 18 can ever be assigned it or take part in it, either side) may invite a visiting guest back to a marked bed. Mark any bed for this via a bed toggle - a colonist's own bed is preferred if marked, but any marked bed that isn't someone else's private room will do, and the nicer the bed and room, the more they can charge. Success is based on the colonist's Social skill and Beauty, respects RimWorld's normal gender/orientation compatibility and each pawn's ideoligion (a strict monogamy precept makes a married or principled pawn unwilling, same as vanilla), and hands off entirely to the game's own lovin' job - nothing explicit is added or depicted. Guests pay for the privilege once the encounter actually finishes.
On top of the base mechanic: - Trains Social skill, one of the hardest stats to raise normally. - Pawns slowly grow more comfortable with the work over repeated sessions (mood + success chance), with distinct trait reactions for Prude/Asexual (dislike it) and Insatiable, if those traits are present (Vanilla Traits Expanded compatible). - Slaves react differently: a consistent negative thought each time, and their Will (escape/rebellion chance) is worn down - though if fully broken down while still growing strangely used to it, even Unwavering Loyal can eventually crack. - The bed's sheets visibly tint burgundy while the toggle is on. - Soft integration with "Intimacy - Friends n' Lovers", if installed - a completed session also feeds its Intimacy need.
MEAL DELIVERY Companions may also bring a hungry guest a meal right to their room instead of making them go find their own food, for a small delivery fee - the room service theme, extended to meals.
HOSPITAL HAND-OFF (requires the separate "Hospital" mod by Adamas) If a visiting guest falls sick or gets hurt by an ordinary random event while staying with you, they can be handed off to become a tracked patient of the separate "Hospital" mod instead - that mod's own billing, tending, and patient management take over from there. Does nothing if that mod isn't installed.
Every price, weight, and chance above is a slider in the mod settings, and each major feature has its own on/off switch.
Requires Hospitality and Harmony (load after both).
